name: startup-skills
description: An Aggressive Epistemic Auditor for founders. 21 skills, 33 references, from idea to PMF and beyond. Y Combinator methodology, the Mom Test, continuous discovery (Torres), JTBD (Moesta), positioning (Dunford), decision quality (Duke/Tetlock/Kahneman), and the 2026 AI-era playbook — applied as structural overrides.
